Grade.description: Valid review grades. N/A is explicitly excluded.
Grade.title: Grade

description:
Per-file review outcome — one per diff file per reviewer.

Emitted BEFORE ReviewConcept objects in the .jsonl file. Provides
exhaustive per-file coverage for the File Coverage card. Every file
in the diff must have a FileReviewOutcome from every reviewer.

Distinguished from ReviewConcept by the `_type: "file_review"` field.

file.description: File path relative to repo root (must match a file in the diff)
file.title: File

grade.description: Quality grade for this file from this reviewer's paradigm

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the file's status from this paradigm
summary.title: Summary

reviewed.description: Whether the reviewer actually examined this file (false for skip/N/A)
reviewed.title: Reviewed

title: FileReviewOutcome
